title: Chapter 110
content:
Chapter 110

While Zara’s training was important, it was also important to uncover some of the hidden truths. So once I was alone, I focused on everything that had happened so far.

I came to this free-use world where sex had no meaning. People had romantic feelings, but nothing beyond that. The way babies were born was also strange. I mean, I hadn’t seen it myself, but apparently they were made in balls full of goo, much like a woman’s womb, but there was no ovulation, implantation, or fertilization involved.

It was something else. Something kind of scientific and a mixture of fantasy. But one thing was for sure, I had never seen anything like that before.

After that came my relations with the women of this world. Well, there was nothing much to say there. The women were pretty much normal. All the erotic spots and functions of their bodies were the same. It was only different for the men who were born with a stub instead of a dick.

No, the interesting detail of that was that while women shared the tendencies of the women from my previous worlds, there were some differences as well. Like they couldn’t get their periods, I mean, Zara could, but hers was more like a condition. Not every woman could.

And then there was the fact that my semen increased their strengths, which was also dependent on their talents, but it helped nonetheless.

I didn’t know if it helped only women, but god forbid if I was ever going to try the second option, even out of curiosity. Even if someone forced me to, I would rather kill myself and depart from this wonderful world happily.

After that would come the events that had happened so far.

The two organizations that sought bloodline purity and enslavement of the commoners, or their outright nonexistence.

The nobles and their power play. The queen, whose circumstances were rather confusing at the moment.

The rats from the sewers and something regarding them. Something about creation or something. And that led to another incident. The last one on my list.

Which was none other than the dungeon incident. The monsters that came out of them were nothing more than lab experiments. The way their bodies were constructed said enough about them. And then there was the fact that they had dicks growing inside of them. Almost like someone was trying to grow those dicks on the outside, but was not successful in doing so.

These were the matters that confused me about this world. About the structure of this world, and whatever was happening around me at the moment.

Finally, it was my turn. About me, I had only one question. Not much ever bothered me about this body. The family history or whatnot never mattered to me. The only thing that rang warning bells in my mind was my bloodline.

The name of the said bloodline wasn’t even revealed, and some effects that were revealed didn’t say much about it.

I had a feeling it was also the nature of this bloodline that I was able to increase the strength of the women I had sex with, but that was probably just me. Or it could be true, which required further research.

So, ignoring that, what really worried me about my bloodline was the unknown details surrounding it. Humans were always afraid of the unknown, and I was a human in the end. I was scared too.

Scared of leaving this wonderful world.

Anyway, I opened my eyes after about an hour of organizing everything. I set aside some issues, such as the blue lilies, the cloak figures who brought them to the sewers, and other races.

For now, I needed to deal with the more pressing matters.

And then there was this quest.

[The King Slayer]

[Rank: B+]

[Description: Now that you have begun your journey in this wonderful new world, it is time you make yourself a being no one can easily contend with

That is only possible when you are in a position of power

But, isn’t someone already in that position?

What then?

Are you going to jointly rule the nation?

That cannot happen

There can never be two kings

Certainly not a king that can coexist with you]

[Task: Kill the king of Newmark: Augustus von Julius]

[Reward: Whatever the king owns]

[Punishment: Progression of the Final Deed]

[Time limit: 300 days]

While not a lot of time had passed since this quest arrived, I had a feeling it was a much deeper quest than I thought.

With the queen involved, it wouldn’t simply end with taking over the throne after killing the king. Something more would be required. Something like taking over everything.

And then just taking over a throne and making everyone submit wasn’t everything. There were civilian matters to take care of. If this world were anything like the real one except for sexual desires, then I had no doubt there would be those who would be vying for the seat where a kid sat. Although that kid was hundreds of thousands of years older than they were, he would still be a kid.

And then there were the surrounding nations. Who doesn’t love a country where a massive change has occurred, and the chain of command is clouded? The world would go crazy over it, and someone with a severe ambition wouldn’t just leave this golden opportunity.

So far, there have been many things I needed to take care of. Everything was dumped on me suddenly, and I was too focused on enjoying the new life that I had forgotten about one crucial thing.

Strength was everything. If I didn’t have the power to protect what was mine, it would be taken away. I couldn’t afford that. I couldn’t leave anything I currently had.

So, perhaps it was time to be a little forward.

Perhaps it was time to work up some magic.

[Skill: Corruption]

A risky move indeed, but I had no other choice.

I needed to make sure I was the only person in the lives of those around me. Everything else was expendable. Even their own children.

“You’re here,” Zara said with a smile when I entered her room. And looking at her, I smiled as well.

I was going to make her mine tonight.

~~

Ignore the mistakes if there are any.
